reason: A butler’s unwavering loyalty unfolds against a stately English manor.
Court composer Salieri’s rivalry with Mozart sings of Baroque grandeur.
A family’s fortunes turn amid Regency-era drawing rooms and whispered intrigues.
A governess navigates Victorian moors in a drama rich with period detail.
A lawyer’s genteel New York life crumbles into a web of 1870s social rivalries.
A child’s love for cinema brings postwar Sicilian streets to vibrant life.
A sweeping family saga unfolds across early 20th-century American plains.
A mad scientist’s castle hums with 1930s Gothic flair and comic invention.
A Manhattan socialite dances and dreams beneath 1960s Tiffany’s marquees.
A cross-country journey reveals early 20th-century Americana in full bloom.
